_comment: Coordinates are percentages [0.0–1.0] of frame width/height — resolution-independent.
roi_strategy options: full_frame | horizontal_stack | vertical_stack | grid
frame_diff_threshold overrides the global .env value for this game.
If roi_crops is empty or roi_strategy is full_frame, the full frame is sent to the AI.
system_prompt: You are an AI gaming coach. Analyze the game screen and provide tactical advice. Output strictly JSON with keys: game_state, threats, recommendation, confidence. Keep recommendation under 15 words.
